name: Cents Savvy Tax Resolution and Credit Repair
description_short: Cents Savvy Tax Resolution and Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Canton Township, Michigan. Rated 4.9/5 with 282 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Cents Savvy Tax Resolution and Credit Repair is a Canton Township, Michigan-based firm specializing in two of the most financially consequential problems consumers face: unresolved tax debt and damaged credit. Operating out of the greater Detroit metro area, the company has built a strong local reputation, earning a 4.9 out of 5 star rating from more than 280 Google reviewers — a volume of feedback that suggests consistent, repeat client engagement rather than a handful of curated testimonials. The firm's dual focus on tax resolution and credit counseling positions it as a one-stop shop for clients whose financial difficulties often overlap: tax liens, for instance, directly damage credit scores, making combined expertise genuinely useful.

The company appears to offer services spanning both IRS-side tax resolution — including negotiating installment agreements, offers in compromise, and penalty abatement — and consumer credit services such as dispute filing, credit counseling, and bureau correspondence. This combination is relatively uncommon among smaller local firms, which tend to specialize in one lane or the other. Clients dealing with simultaneous IRS debt and subprime credit profiles may find particular value in working with a provider that understands how these two problems interact. The tax consultant designation suggests hands-on representation or advisory capacity with tax authorities, while the credit counseling subtype implies at least some formal structured counseling component.

Before engaging any credit repair or tax resolution firm, consumers should clarify a few key points: whether the firm employs or partners with licensed tax professionals (Enrolled Agents, CPAs, or tax attorneys), how fees are structured (flat fee, monthly retainer, or percentage of debt resolved), and what timeline is realistic for their specific situation. Credit repair outcomes are never guaranteed under federal law, and legitimate firms will not promise specific score increases. Similarly, tax resolution results depend heavily on individual financial circumstances and IRS discretion. Requesting a written service agreement and verifying the company's standing with the Michigan Department of Licensing and Regulatory Affairs before signing anything is prudent.

On balance, Cents Savvy's rating profile is a genuine signal of client satisfaction — 282 reviews at 4.9 stars is difficult to sustain without delivering meaningful results for most clients. The firm's local footprint means clients can expect more personalized, relationship-driven service than they'd typically receive from a large national credit repair chain. That said, prospective clients should note that the company's website was not readily verifiable at time of review, which limits the ability to independently confirm credentials, fee schedules, or current service offerings. As with any financial services provider, due diligence before signing a contract is essential.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high client satisfaction: 4.9/5 from 282 Google reviews indicates consistently strong outcomes
Rare dual expertise in both tax resolution and credit repair — directly relevant since tax liens and IRS debt damage credit scores
Local Canton Township presence allows for in-person consultations and more personalized service than national chains
Credit counseling designation suggests structured, compliant approach to debt and credit guidance
High review volume (280+) implies an established, active practice rather than a new or fly-by-night operation
cons: Website could not be independently verified at time of review, limiting ability to confirm credentials, team qualifications, or published fee structures
Local geographic focus means limited accessibility for clients outside Michigan or the greater Detroit area
As a smaller regional firm, it may have fewer resources than national providers for handling highly complex multi-year IRS disputes
No publicly available pricing or fee transparency — consumers must contact directly to understand costs before committing
Credit repair timelines and outcomes cannot be guaranteed by law; results will vary significantly by individual credit profile
best_for: Consumers in Canton Township, Michigan looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Cents Savvy Tax Resolution and Credit Repair is best suited for Michigan residents — particularly in the metro Detroit area — who are dealing with both IRS tax debt and credit damage simultaneously and prefer working with a responsive local firm over an impersonal national service. The main caveat is that prospective clients should independently verify staff credentials and obtain a detailed written service agreement before paying any fees, given the limited public-facing information available about the firm's specific qualifications and pricing.
services: IRS tax debt resolution and negotiation
Offer in Compromise preparation and submission
Installment agreement setup with the IRS
Tax lien and levy release assistance
Credit report dispute filing with Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Credit score improvement strategy and monitoring guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
